package rulefixtures

// scenario for binary_read_for_single_field: `binary.Read(r, order, &singleField)` for reading a single integer
// fixture polarity: negative; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule440NegativeRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario440Negative(records []Rule440NegativeRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		total += record.ID + len(record.Values)
	}
	return total
}
